title: Franky & Vampire Halloween Puzzle
description: Play our newest casual puzzle game called Franky & Vampire Halloween Puzzle. The game has 10 levels with exciting Halloween images. Each level is locked and it will be unlocked when you solve the previous level. Build the correct image by clicking to rotate the puzzle pieces before time runs out. Enjoy and have fun!
instructions: Use the mouse to play this game for desktop Click on the screen to rotate for touch screens
